title: magnolia × proctoriana
intro: Magnolia × proctoriana, also known as the Proctor's Magnolia, is a hybrid species of the magnolia family, resulting from the cross between Magnolia grandiflora and Magnolia denudata. The bark, flowers, and leaves of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Magnolia × proctoriana are said to include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant's herbal preparations include tea infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
